---
title: "404 — Page Not Found"
description: "This page doesn't exist."
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="not-found-container">
  <div class="not-found-code">404</div>
  <p class="not-found-tagline">Yogakshema: Strength is power. And well-being is the goal.</p>
  <p class="not-found-sub">The page you're looking for may have moved, been renamed, or never existed — much like several promised reforms.</p>

  <div class="not-found-links">
    <a href="/" class="btn btn-primary">← Home</a>
    <a href="/blog/" class="btn btn-outline-primary">Blog</a>
    <a href="/op-eds/" class="btn btn-outline-primary">Op-eds</a>
    <a href="/publications/" class="btn btn-outline-primary">Publications</a>
    <a href="/talks.html" class="btn btn-outline-primary">Talks</a>
    <a href="/books.html" class="btn btn-outline-primary">Books</a>
    <a href="/courses.html" class="btn btn-outline-primary">Courses</a>
    <a href="/podcast.html" class="btn btn-outline-primary">Podcast</a>
    <a href="/newsletter.html" class="btn btn-outline-primary">Newsletter</a>
  </div>

  <p class="not-found-search">Or try searching for what you need:</p>
  <button class="search-trigger-btn" onclick="
    var btn = document.getElementById('quarto-search');
    if (btn) { btn.click(); }
    else {
      var inp = document.querySelector('.aa-DetachedSearchButtonPlaceholder, #quarto-search-input');
      if (inp) inp.focus();
    }
  ">
    🔍 Search this site
  </button>
</div>
```
